title: Charlotte
overview: In the dead of night, Charlotte, a young girl, appears at Roy’s doorstep, fleeing her abusive father. Despite having had a few too many drinks, Roy reluctantly offers her shelter for the night. What begins as a simple act of kindness soon evolves into a complex relationship as Charlotte’s stay extends beyond a single evening. As the days pass and her trust in Roy deepens, tension mounts, leaving the audience to question the true nature of their connection. With each startling revelation, the line between protector and predator blurs, forcing us to wonder whether either of them is who they seem.
